description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a distinctive two-door design. The body is finished in glossy white with contrasting black side blades, giving it a sporty and modern appearance. The front features a wide, aggressive grille with sharp, angular headlights and a prominent Audi badge. Large, multi-spoke chrome wheels and low-profile tires enhance its athletic stance. The rear is characterized by wide taillights, dual exhausts, and a subtle integrated spoiler. The windows are tinted, and the roofline flows smoothly from the windshield to the rear, emphasizing its fastback silhouette.
description: A glossy white, two-door coupe car with black side blades, chrome wheels, and a streamlined, sporty design. Features include an aggressive front grille, wide taillights, and a fastback roofline.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, sharp headlights, and Audi badge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black side blade, chrome wheels, and coupe profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying wide taillights, dual exhausts, and integrated spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with black side blade and chrome wheels visible.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
